name: Decaying World RPG
description:
WELCOME TO PLANET EDEN 227. A STORMY COLD WINTER. SNOW'S EVERYWHERE! A DECAYING WINTER!


Not much is known of Eden-227 when it was still a safe place to live in, but we do know that once its sun died, Neo-Thermal Generators were used to provide warmth and heat to the planet. However, these would eventually break down (most likely being purposefully destroyed), thus causing the planet to fall into an eternal winter storm in an event called "The Collapse".



----------------

4/11/XX

"A Decaying Winter"


"It's been A while... The fourth wave of the AGENCY has fallen, most fallen Agency of them were Executed or have given up on A lost paradise. The Planet has become more Dangerous, As many Scavengers are Bloodthirsty."


After The Event of Collapse, After the 3rd AGENCY wave has fallen, the 4th AGENCY has been sent. But Unfortunately, Everyone's death expect YOU. Start Your Journey As A Last Stranded Agent Alive. Find A way by yourself how to get out, maybe Cooperate with the Sledge queen's Raider or Someone you can Trust. Start Your Journey, Agent.

"Wearing a short white shirt in a minus Celsius temperature, is crazy isn't it?" - You/The novice


Just have you informed, It's UNFINISHED. It will be finished in The future, A.K.A Holdout Allies, More bosses from factions, rare events like Scav war etc. etc.

Decaying winter made by Archeximus/Red
Decaying world made by Tactical_tact

------------------------------------------------------

UPDATE LOG: 2/2/2024

>Removed R.I.S Faction
